name: codex
description: Invoke Codex CLI for complex coding tasks requiring high reasoning capabilities. Triggers whenever the user names codex as the actor for any task (use/ask/run/call/have/let/delegate to codex, 'codex cli', 'GPT-5 reasoning', 'OpenAI reasoning'); a UserPromptSubmit hook deterministically nudges the codex skill to load whenever a prompt mentions codex. Supports intelligent model selection, session continuation, and safe defaults.
